form.label: Claude Enterprise - Security Audit
form.description: Authentication, identity, access-control, and data-movement auditing from the Anthropic Compliance API. Index scope comes from the anthropic_claude_index macro.

search.query: `anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:compliance:activity" (event_type=org_sso_* OR event_type=org_jit_* OR event_type=org_domain_*) | stats count
`anthropic_claude_index` eventtype=anthropic_claude_auth_events event_type=user_signed_in_* | stats count by event_type | sort - count

panel.title: Sign-ins by User and Source IP

search.query: `anthropic_claude_index` eventtype=anthropic_claude_auth_events event_type=user_signed_in_* | stats count earliest(_time) AS first_seen latest(_time) AS last_seen by actor_email, actor_ip_address | convert ctime(first_seen) ctime(last_seen) | sort - count

`anthropic_claude_index` eventtype=anthropic_claude_auth_events event_type=user_signed_in_* | stats dc(actor_ip_address) AS distinct_ips values(actor_ip_address) AS ips earliest(_time) AS first_seen latest(_time) AS last_seen by actor_email | where distinct_ips > 2 | convert ctime(first_seen) ctime(last_seen) | sort - distinct_ips

`anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:compliance:activity" (event_type=org_sso_* OR event_type=org_jit_* OR event_type=org_domain_*) | table _time, event_type, actor_email, organization_id | sort - _time

`anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:compliance:activity" (event_type=org_user_deleted OR event_type=user_name_changed OR event_type=org_user_invite_* OR event_type=*_role_updated OR event_type=rbac_*) | table _time, event_type, actor_email, organization_id | sort - _time
`anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:compliance:activity" event_type=*api_key_* | table _time, event_type, actor_email, actor_type | sort - _time
`anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:compliance:activity" event_type=*_failed | stats count by event_type, actor_email | sort - count
`anthropic_claude_index` eventtype=anthropic_claude_change_events | table _time, event_type, actor_email, claude_project_id, claude_chat_id, organization_id | sort - _time

`anthropic_claude_index` eventtype=anthropic_claude_api_access_events | stats count dc(actor_ip_address) AS ips values(actor_ip_address) AS ip_list earliest(_time) AS first_seen latest(_time) AS last_seen by actor_user_agent | convert ctime(first_seen) ctime(last_seen) | sort - count
`anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:compliance:activity" event_type=org_data_export_* | table _time, event_type, actor_email, organization_id | sort - _time
`anthropic_claude_index` eventtype=anthropic_claude_file_events event_type=*_uploaded | table _time, actor_email, file_id, claude_chat_id, claude_project_id | sort - _time
`anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:compliance:activity" actor_type=scim_directory_sync_actor | stats count by event_type | sort - count
